markdown_projection.note: JSON contract is authority. No markdown projection is generated for WP-KERNEL-009 (prevents projection drift).

scope.scope: Obsidian-parity authoring set on LoomBlock authority: hover preview (link hover shows live block preview card), note transclusion (embed a block/note inside another doc, rendered read-through, edits route to the source - never a copy), templates (define + insert with variables: date/title/cursor), properties panel (typed block metadata view/edit on LoomBlock fields + tags), bookmarks (pin docs/blocks/searches into a bookmarks tree; reuse Pins backend), search operators in Loom search UI (tag:, path:/folder:, kind:, mention:).
constraints: Use the existing microtask_plan_draft execution surface only; do not introduce a separate MT execution surface or suite field.

Core Handshake behavior must be Handshake-native: no outside app, outside server, external daemon, Docker-only path, SQLite fallback, Redis/Valkey cache authority, or sidecar paper as proof or authority.
Bundled/lockfile-governed product libraries only (Tiptap/Monaco precedent); no CDN; no external app launches as product behavior.
PostgreSQL plus EventLedger is canonical for durable state, receipts, indexing evidence, runtime proof, and validation; UI artifacts are projections only.
Every implementation handoff must be restartable by a no-context local model using only the WP/MT contract, current Master Spec bundle (v02.193), product code, tests, and receipts.

OPERATOR ORDER (DEC-007, 2026-06-12): NO scaffolding, templates, mock-ups, or vibecoding; every feature must be working AND tested in runtime (executed vitest/Playwright/real-PG proof per feature, not status text). A feature without an executed runtime proof is NOT done.
Transclusion renders the SOURCE block (authority read-through); editing transcluded content edits the source with receipts - no divergent copies (negative test required).
Templates are data, not code (no eval).
scope.expected_behavior: Hover shows the note behind a link; ![[block]] embeds live content; templates stamp structured notes; properties and bookmarks behave Obsidian-class.
acceptance_criteria: Hover preview on real links proven.
Transclusion edit-routes-to-source proven + no-copy negative test.
Properties edit persists to LoomBlock (real backend).
Each search operator filters real results (proven).
Adversarial self-review recorded per the WP loop; findings fixed before evidence write.
verification: pnpm vitest run green; tsc --noEmit clean; eslint clean.
Offline Playwright runtime proof for each named capability (zero external network requests).
handoff_requirements: List files changed, tests run with exact names/counts, commits.
List EventLedger/PostgreSQL evidence and Playwright artifacts produced.
List remaining risks and any honestly-documented deviations (e.g., prose multi-cursor approach).

evidence: commit f867ee59 on feat/WP-KERNEL-009 (32 files, +2952/-51, zero .GOV files); worktree clean

real-PG runtime proof: loom_transclusion_tests 2/2 PASS (read-through resolves SOURCE, edit routes to source + version advances, HOST persists only the loomTransclusion atom node with no copied body); loom_pins_views_tests 7/7 PASS regression; block_tree 9/9 PASS (BlockKind::Transclusion no regression)

frontend proof: vitest 16 tests PASS (node NO-COPY roundtrip, NodeView read-through/edit-routes/unresolved/error, LoomBlockPanel tags); tsc --noEmit clean; eslint clean; offline Playwright loom-transclusion + loom-search-operators + loom-note-template 3 PASS (zero external network asserted)

harden pass closed the deferred search-bookmark deviation with REAL PG durability: migration 0330_workspace_search_bookmark_state.sql(+.down), PG-backed saved-search store (api/workspaces.rs, storage/mod.rs, storage/postgres.rs), WorkspaceSearchPanel migrated off localStorage; properties tag-edit via tag loom_edges in patch_loom_block

VALIDATION CAVEAT: transclusion resolution requires loom_blocks.document_id to share the legacy `documents` anchor with knowledge_rich_documents; import_markdown_to_loom currently leaves document_id NULL, so existing imported notes resolve as typed-unresolved (not blank) until a follow-up MT sets that anchor on note-block creation
consumed migration number 0330 (next free for downstream MTs is 0331+)

wp_validator_review_v2.review_method: Integration Validator multi-agent workflow (wf_0ac25815-485 + wf_98386044-70a): independent per-MT reviewer + adversarial confirm on FAIL. No ACP. Governance/repo paperwork non-blocking per operator directive (2026-06-18). Bar = good code vs MT contract + WP packet + current Master Spec v02.194, plus the WP_VALIDATOR Spec-Realism Gate.
wp_validator_review_v2.summary: MT-258 implements the Obsidian-parity notes-authoring set (hover preview, transclusion, templates, properties panel, bookmarks, search operators) on LoomBlock authority. The code is real and substantial, wires to the Handshake-native PostgreSQL + EventLedger backend (no SQLite/Docker/mock), and each named capability has real runtime proof: PG-backed cargo tests for transclusion (read-through/edit-routes-to-source/no-copy) and properties tag-edit, a durable PG-backed saved-search route, and offline Playwright + vitest for the editor surfaces.
findings: Transclusion backend is real: get_loom_block_transclusion (src/backend/handshake_core/src/api/loom.rs:598-659) resolves loom_blocks.document_id -> knowledge_rich_documents and returns live SOURCE content_json + version; typed unresolved states (loom_block_has_no_source_document / source_rich_document_missing) are never silent blanks.

NO-COPY invariant is enforced and proven: the loomTransclusion node is an atom carrying only {refValue} (app/src/lib/tiptap/loom_transclusion_node.ts:58-102; renderHTML emits a content-free placeholder), and loom_transclusion_tests.rs:356-439 asserts a host doc persists exactly one atom node and never absorbs the source body.

Edit-routes-to-source is proven against real PG: loom_transclusion_tests.rs:314-354 edits via PUT /knowledge/documents/:source/save, asserts source version advances, the re-read transclusion shows the edited content, and the old body is gone (single authority, no divergent copy).

Properties tag-edit is real-backend: patch_loom_block add_tags/remove_tags creates/removes real `tag` loom_edges, recomputes authoritative derived.tag_count, and enforces the HSK-400-LOOM-TAG-TARGET-MUST-BE-TAG_HUB guard; inline PG route test mt258_properties_tag_edit_persists_edges_and_metrics (git show f867ee59 loom.rs) verifies persistence, idempotent add, removal, guard rejection, and reads tag_count back from the store.

Real defect fixed in the harden pass: the new tags_added/tags_removed payload keys failed flight-recorder require_exact_keys validate(), silently dropping every LoomBlockUpdated receipt; validate_loom_block_updated_payload now permits the optional tag arrays (flight_recorder/mod.rs).

Saved searches/bookmarks moved off localStorage to durable PG+EventLedger: migration 0330_workspace_search_bookmark_state.sql creates knowledge_workspace_search_bookmark_states with a CHECK on schema_id/bookmarks and an FK to kernel_event_ledger(event_id); storage trait+Postgres impl, KnowledgeWorkspaceSearchBookmarkStateRecorded event, and /workspaces/:id/search-bookmarks GET/PUT route back the UI projection.

Templates are data-only (no eval): template.note.daily runs insertNoteTemplate (app/src/lib/editor/editor_commands.ts:379-387 -> editor_note_templates), satisfying the 'templates are data, not code' constraint.

Search operators are a real parser feeding the real backend: parseLoomSearchOperators (app/src/lib/loom_search_query.ts) parses tag:/path:/folder:/kind:/mention: and WorkspaceSearchPanel.tsx (lines 393-575) feeds tagIds/mentionIds/sourceKinds/path into searchLoomGraph against the real /loom/graph-search route.

PG proof path is genuine: knowledge_pg_support.rs resolves POSTGRES_TEST_URL/DATABASE_URL or the Handshake-managed cluster, with NO SQLite/in-memory/mock fallback; absent binaries -> SKIP, any other failure panics, so a broken cluster cannot read green.

Sub_rule_1 scan: the only todo/unreachable hits in touched files are unreachable!() inside #[cfg(test)] expected-error branches in workspaces.rs (e.g. lines 1711,1823,1878) — standard test idiom, not a live-path escape.

Honest documented deviation (not a blocker): imported markdown notes leave loom_blocks.document_id NULL so existing imported notes resolve as typed-unresolved until a follow-up MT sets the anchor on note-block creation; this is a visible fail-closed state, recorded in lifecycle.evidence.
Aside (non-blocking): MT contract cites Master Spec bundle v02.193 while current is v02.194; section numbers resolve identically and this is expected paperwork drift during governance wind-down.
evidence_checked: wtc-kernel-009/src/backend/handshake_core/src/api/loom.rs (transclusion handler + tag-edit test via git show)
grep scan for deferred-live escapes across MT-258 touched files

minimum_controls: No placeholders, mocks, scaffolding, or deferred-live escapes; runtime proof against Handshake-managed PostgreSQL/EventLedger and/or offline Playwright where the contract names durable state or GUI behavior.
